what: FCA scenarios for FSC-2417: 10 scenario(s), Consumer Duty covered=True, COBS=3 — verdict=PASS
why: Generated 10 FCA regulatory test scenario(s) for a HIGH-FCA story. Consumer Duty: covered. 0 regulatory gap(s).

fca_test_scenarios.title: Suitability Assessment Completion Before Investment Recommendation
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that a Wealth Adviser cannot submit a personal investment recommendation without a fully completed and approved Suitability__c / SuitabilityAssessment record linked to the client's RiskProfile__c in Salesforce FSC.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: System blocks recommendation submission and displays a validation error when no linked, completed SuitabilityAssessment record exists. Compliance Officer sign-off is recorded on the record before the recommendation proceeds.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: System allows a personal investment recommendation to be submitted without a completed SuitabilityAssessment or RiskProfile__c record, or without Compliance Officer approval on the IndividualApplication.

fca_test_scenarios.title: Risk Profile Mismatch — Recommendation Blocked
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that the platform prevents a Wealth Adviser from recommending a financial product whose risk rating exceeds the client's documented risk tolerance on RiskProfile__c (capacity for loss field).
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: An Apex validation or Flow raises a clear, auditable warning or hard stop when the recommended product's risk tier exceeds the client's RiskProfile__c tolerance. The event is logged for Compliance Officer review.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: A high-risk product can be recommended to a client with a low-risk RiskProfile__c without any system-level warning, block, or audit trail entry.

fca_test_scenarios.title: Appropriateness Check for Non-Advised Services
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that the Appropriateness__c record is created and passed before a client can access a non-advised investment service via the self-service portal, confirming the client understands the risks involved.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: Client access to non-advised investment products is gated by a completed, passing Appropriateness__c record. Failed checks result in a clear on-screen message explaining the outcome and next steps.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: A client with no Appropriateness__c record, or a failing one, can access or transact on a non-advised investment product without any restriction or warning.

fca_test_scenarios.title: Investment Product Communications Are Clear, Fair and Not Misleading
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that all client-facing LWC components and automated communications (emails, portal notifications) related to investment products meet the Consumer Duty consumer understanding outcome — language is plain English, fees are disclosed, and risks are prominently displayed.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: All client-facing materials present fees, charges, and risk warnings in plain English. A Compliance Officer review sign-off is recorded. Automated UAT content scan finds no jargon or hidden charges.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: Client-facing UI or communications omit fee disclosures, use technical jargon without explanation, or bury material risk warnings in a way a reasonable retail customer would not notice.

fca_test_scenarios.title: Vulnerable Customer Flag Triggers Enhanced Care Journey
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that when a VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c flag is set on a client record, all automated Flows, LWC screens, and adviser prompts switch to an enhanced care pathway — including extended time allowances, simplified language, and escalation to a human adviser.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: Setting VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c = TRUE triggers: (1) adviser dashboard alert, (2) simplified UI mode on client-facing screens, (3) suppression of automated-only decision pathways, (4) audit log entry timestamped at flag activation.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: A client with VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c = TRUE is processed identically to a standard client — no adviser alert, no UI adaptation, and no audit trail of enhanced care steps taken.

fca_test_scenarios.title: FinancialGoal Alignment — Products Must Meet Client Needs
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that the platform cross-checks recommended FinancialAccount products against the client's FinancialGoal__c records to ensure the product is designed to meet the stated goal (e.g. retirement, property purchase) and does not create foreseeable harm.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: The system surfaces a warning or requires Compliance Officer override when a recommended product's term, risk, or liquidity profile is materially inconsistent with the linked FinancialGoal__c. Misalignment is recorded on the IndividualApplication.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: Products with clearly mismatched liquidity or risk profiles (e.g. a 20-year illiquid product for a client with a 2-year property goal) can be recommended and approved without any system warning or documented rationale.

fca_test_scenarios.title: AUM Fee Transparency — Revenue__c Calculations Are Disclosed
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that Revenue__c AUM-based fee calculations are visible to the client on their portal and match the fee schedule documented in their suitability report, ensuring no undisclosed charges exist.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: The client portal displays Revenue__c fee breakdowns that reconcile 100% with the fee schedule on the SuitabilityAssessment record. Any discrepancy triggers an automated alert to the Compliance Officer.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: Revenue__c charges applied to a client's FinancialAccount differ from the fee schedule documented in their SuitabilityAssessment, or the fee breakdown is not accessible to the client on the portal.

fca_test_scenarios.title: Annual Suitability Review — Stale Assessment Blocks New Recommendations
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that the platform enforces an annual suitability review cycle: SuitabilityAssessment records older than 12 months are flagged as stale, and new investment recommendations are blocked until a refreshed assessment is completed and approved.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: Attempting to create a new investment recommendation when the linked SuitabilityAssessment is > 12 months old triggers a hard stop in the Apex layer or Flow, with a message directing the adviser to complete a new assessment. Stale assessments appear on the Compliance Officer dashboard.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: A new investment recommendation can be submitted and approved against a SuitabilityAssessment record last updated more than 12 months ago without any system warning or block.

fca_test_scenarios.title: Compliance Officer Audit Trail for HIGH-FCA Approvals
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that every HIGH-FCA change (modifications to Suitability__c, RiskProfile__c, or VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c records) generates an immutable audit trail capturing the acting user, timestamp, previous value, new value, and approval chain, accessible only to authorised Compliance Officers.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: FSC audit logs and Salesforce Field History Tracking capture all field-level changes to HIGH-FCA objects. Compliance Officer can produce a complete change history for any client record within 2 minutes. Log entries cannot be deleted by non-system admins.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: Changes to SuitabilityAssessment, RiskProfile__c, or VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c fields are not captured in audit logs, or the audit log is editable/deletable by users without System Administrator + Compliance Officer permission sets.

fca_test_scenarios.title: Vulnerable Customer Cannot Be Disadvantaged by Automated-Only Processes
fca_test_scenarios.description: Verify that no automated Flow or Apex batch process makes a final, outcome-determinative decision (e.g. account closure, product restriction, fee change) for a client with VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c = TRUE without a mandatory human adviser review step.
fca_test_scenarios.pass_criteria: All batch or automated processes check for VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c = TRUE before execution. If the flag is set, the process pauses and creates a Task for the assigned Wealth Adviser with a mandatory completion step before the automation resumes.
fca_test_scenarios.fail_criteria: An automated batch job closes, restricts, or modifies the account of a client flagged as vulnerable without creating an adviser Task or requiring human sign-off, resulting in a potentially harmful outcome with no human intervention.
